channel.title: Tax Incentives on Myers & Shah PLLC
channel.description: Recent content in Tax Incentives on Myers & Shah PLLC

item.title: Tax Incentives for Real Estate Development in the District of Columbia: What Developers Need to Know
item.description: DC offers several powerful tax incentive programs for real estate development, including TIF, tax abatements, and QHTC benefits. Here is a practical overview of the tools available.
